race.comment: Tricky contest. PRINCE DE VEGA (4) is a six-start maiden who was in the placings at his last two starts, finishing third at the latest appearance over 1200m at Yarra Valley. Will find this a little easier than last time. Well placed and expected to go close. SUNSET ROYALE (13) is yet to break through in four runs. Finished fourth at her last appearance over 1000m at Wagga on March 29. Well placed on this occasion and gets her chance to break through. MAMMA MIA (11) is back after a break of five months. At the last run before the layoff finished fourth over 1600m at Wyong. Should be forward enough following two recent trials. Rates highly and is a chance to break through. GET LITT (18) was well in commission on debut when seventh over 1000m at Canberra. Fitter now and expected to be right there at the business end.
